title: Support ecological restoration
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Support ecological restoration demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

pcs.text: Interpret instructions and directions from supervisor
